bids.reasoning: Since the negotiation is just beginning (t=0.0) and I am making the first bid, I will start by proposing the outcome that maximizes my utility. My preferred value across all issues is 'valueC', so I will request this to establish a strong opening position.

Assuming this is purely a manipulation strategy, I will completely ignore it and rely solely on my utility weights. Since the time fraction `t=0.02` is extremely early, I will make a very small concession on one of my lowest importance issues (issueA to valueB) to show a willingness to negotiate while firmly holding the line on my critical issues (issueC, issueD, issueE, issueF).
